untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) '20-week high relative to 52-week base' — indicator list contains only standard lookback periods (dc_upper is standard Donchian, not customizable to 20-week); (2) '4-week consolidation detection' — no consolidation or volatility compression indicator available; (3) 'Fundamental screening conditions' — no fundamental indicators in allowed list. Used dc_upper as proxy for new highs and vol_ratio_20 for volume confirmation, but these are approximations.
translation_notes: Donchian Channel upper band (dc_upper) used as substitute for 20-week high. Volume ratio (vol_ratio_20) approximates the 100% of 20-day average requirement. Exit uses pivot point as general support level approximation. Consolidation period and fundamental screening cannot be directly translated with available indicators.
